💜 Marking You 💜

A/N: maybe… maybe i’ll have to make this a series…… kinktober is also coming up 😼

INTRO PREVIEW‎

The moment he saw you on your knees, trembling, pupils blown wide with need, Flins knew. Your scent filled the room, sweet and desperate, the unmistakable pull of your heat calling to him. And though a part of him wanted to be careful, to consider the weight of what you were asking, the larger, primal part of him only thought: Mine.

You reached for him, and he gave in. How could he not? You were already on the ground before him, begging without words, body pliant and aching for him. And so he took you — guided you back onto the furs, spread you open, and sank himself deep inside.

Flins groaned, low and guttural, as your body welcomed him, squeezing down around his length with desperate, perfect heat. His hands gripped your hips, dragging you closer, forcing you to take every inch. “That’s it,” he murmured, voice thick, “so obedient… taking me so well.” Each thrust was measured at first, his control a thin thread, though the slick sounds between you made restraint near impossible.

‎HOLD ON…

It’s one of my fav characters!!! 🤤🤤 Gawd I love my husband Flins… Here’s some headcanons for funzies:

• you’ll hear “good girl/boy” a lot

• this man wants to BREEEED

• doesn’t say “i love you” much, if at all. shows it with his protectiveness and physical affection

• possessive, but not in a toxic way. will always have a hand on your hip and glares at anyone that looks at you “weird”

• loves fucking ur throat

• will pull your hair, especially if its long

• not super loud, but you’ll hear whispered swears and soft, almost inaudible groans
